title: Justicia oerstedii
taxonomy: Justicia oerstedii is a species of flowering plant in the family Acanthaceae. It is a member of the genus Justicia, which comprises over 600 species of plants. The Acanthaceae family is a large and diverse group of flowering plants that are commonly found in tropical and subtropical regions. The species Justicia oerstedii is native to Central America, where it grows in a variety of habitats, including wetlands and forests. As a member of the Acanthaceae family, Justicia oerstedii is a dicotyledonous plant, meaning it has two cotyledons or seed leaves in its seedling stage.

The plant has been traditionally used in folk medicine to treat various health issues, including fever, colds, and respiratory problems.
